case_title: LARAMAR SF URBAN APARTMENTS VS. MATTHEW HENRY et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-05-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MATTHEW HENRY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
